codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior blocking issue by extending the checked-in divergence registry to the canonical token-price runtime 503 mismatch, regenerating the checked-in diff report so the token-price finding is expected instead of actionable, and adding a focused regression test for the registry/report behavior.

summary: Review passed: the fix resolves the original token-price divergence-registry failure. Commit 28d0a40 adds the token-price registry entry, updates the generated replay diff report to show 2 expected runtime divergences (simple price and token price) and 0 actionable findings for that runtime case, and adds regression coverage proving both cases remain expected when registered.
